MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Conrad House is present. Represented by Paul Schmidt.
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Larry Chappell, is present.
Attorney, Jeremy Reyes , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-28-2010 is vacated.
